rule: Open with a what-if, contrarian, or FOMO hook — never a hashtag or news announcement
reason: What-if (Code to Figma: 22.4K), identity (India's answer: 19K), FOMO all beat news openers (UPI: 5.2K). The hook is the reel.

rule: No intro. Zero. Straight into the hook from frame 1.
reason: Every top reel opens cold. Any warm-up kills retention in the first 2 seconds.
JioFrames at 41s underperformed. Indus at 38s got steady push but lower peak. Sweet spot is 31–36s.

rule: Chase saves AND shares together — that combo triggers the algorithm at scale
reason: Companies paying lakhs 24h final: 745 saves + 625 shares = 20,646 views + 47 follows. Saves + shares together = algorithm goes full push. Saves alone = reach. Saves + shares = viral growth + real follows.

rule: Use the India vs West frame whenever possible
reason: Top 3 organic reels use this angle — India's Meta glasses (19K), Code to Figma (22.4K design narrative), JioFrames. India-framed reels consistently outperform pure tech announcements.

rule: Lead with a strong product or screen visual — no plain logo graphics
reason: UPI reel was logo-only = 5.2K. Every strong reel had product shots, screen recordings, or app UI. B-roll quality directly impacts retention.

rule: Use punchy, opinionated language + triple short sentences for rhythm
reason: 'India can't touch it without blocking Google' beats 'may be harder to block'. Triple rhythm: 'No studio. No photographer. No budget.' — makes it feel spoken, not written.

rule: End utility reels with a save CTA. End opinion reels with a debate question.
reason: Match the CTA to the content type. Utility = 'save this'. Opinion/identity = open question that invites debate. Wrong CTA wastes the setup.

rule: Ride trending topics within 24–48h of breaking — speed is distribution
reason: Supabase block was 2 days old and still had runway. Day 5+ is too late. Speed to publish is a competitive advantage, not just good practice.

rule: Balance content types — don't become a 'save for later' account
reason: High saves without profile activity = people hoarding, not following. Target mix: ~40% useful, ~30% news, ~20% entertainment, ~10% bookmark. Mix keeps active viewers, not just collectors.
